item.title: UniSat
item.description: Welcome to UniSat Wallet Your trusted Bitcoin wallet with full support for Ordinals and Runes protocols.

item.title: UniSat Wallet - Chrome Web Store
item.description: Why Choose UniSat? ?? All-in-One Asset Management Securely store and manage your Bitcoin and all Bitcoin-native assets including Ordinals, Runes, and Alkanes in one unified interface. ?? 100%...

item.title: UniSat to Complete a System-Wide Upgrade Aligned with the Latest ...
item.description: UniSat - wallet, explorer & extension for bitcoin. (@unisat_wallet). 30 likes 12 replies 711 views. UniSat to Complete a System-Wide Upgrade Aligned with the Latest Ordinals Version To further advance standardization and on-chain expressiveness within Ordinals ecosystem, UniSat is undertaking a comprehensive system upgrade aligned with the latest Ordinals version. This upgrade will span the ...

item.title: How to Deposit/Withdraw Assets - UniSat
item.description: UniSat supports 4 types of address formats for BTC, Ordinals, Runes, and Alkanes. Before depositing, make sure the address format in your UniSat Wallet matches the format used on the withdrawal platform.

item.title: Releases · unisat-wallet/extension - GitHub
item.description: The first open-source browser extension wallet for Bitcoin NFTs - Releases · unisat-wallet/extension

item.title: Install UniSat Wallet | OpenStamp
item.description: Step 1 - Download UniSat Wallet Official Website: https://unisat.io/download Chrome Store: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/unisat/ppbibelpcjmhbdihakflkdcoccbgbkpo Github: https://github.com/unisat-wallet/extension/releases/latest

item.title: UniSat Wallet | UniSat
item.description: You can manage BTC, Ordinals, Runes, and Alkanes in one place, with multi-seed import and batch address derivation. Seamlessly access UniSat Marketplace, Inscribe, InSwap, UniScan and other services, and switch between Bitcoin and Fractal with a single click.

item.title: UniSat Wallet - Apps on Google Play
item.description: UniSat Wallet delivers the perfect combination of security, convenience, and power for managing your Bitcoin assets. Download now and take full control of your digital wealth!

item.title: How to Manage Your UniSat Wallet
item.description: Q: What If I Forgot My Wallet Password? UniSat does not store or transmit your wallet password. If you've forgotten it: You can restore the wallet using your seed phrase. During the restoration, you can set a new password. If you don’t have the seed phrase, unfortunately, there is no way to reset or recover the password.

item.title: unisat-wallet · GitHub
item.description: The official UniSat Wallet monorepo for browser extension, mobile apps, and shared wallet infrastructure. TypeScript 6 8 dev-support Public
